content.body:
## What is MindRoom?

**MindRoom** is an **AI agent orchestration system with Matrix integration** — in short, it lets you run AI agents that live in [Matrix](https://matrix.org) chat rooms and can collaborate with each other to get things done.

---

### 🧠 Core Concept

> *"AI agents that live in Matrix and work everywhere via bridges."*

MindRoom connects AI agents (powered by LLMs like GPT, Claude, etc.) to Matrix rooms. From there, agents can be bridged to Discord, Slack, Telegram, and other platforms.

---

### ✨ Key Features

| Feature | Description |
|---|---|
| **Multi-agent collaboration** | Configure specialized agents that work together in teams |
| **Matrix-native** | Agents live in Matrix rooms and respond to messages |
| **Persistent memory** | Agent & team-scoped memory across conversations |
| **100+ tool integrations** | GitHub, Slack, Gmail, Calendar, and more |
| **Router** | Built-in traffic director routes messages to the right agent |
| **Skills** | OpenClaw-compatible skills system for extended capabilities |
| **Knowledge Bases** | File-backed RAG indexing for document search |
| **Scheduling** | Schedule tasks via cron or natural language |
| **Voice & Image support** | Speech-to-text + image analysis with vision models |
| **Authorization** | Fine-grained access control per user and room |
| **Hot Reload** | Config changes auto-restart agents without downtime |
| **OpenAI-Compatible API** | Use agents from LibreChat, Open WebUI, or any OpenAI client |

---

### 🏗️ Architecture

```
┌─────────────────────── Matrix Homeserver ───────────────────────┐
└──────────────────────┬──────────────────────────────────────────┘
                       │
┌──────────────────────▼──────────────────────────────────────────┐
│              MultiAgentOrchestrator                              │
│  ┌─────────┐ ┌─────────┐ ┌─────────┐ ┌─────────┐               │
│  │ Router  │ │ Agent 1 │ │ Agent 2 │ │  Team   │               │
│  └─────────┘ └─────────┘ └─────────┘ └─────────┘               │
└─────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────┘
```

- **Matrix Homeserver** is the communication backbone
- **MultiAgentOrchestrator** manages all agents and routes messages
- **Agents** are single-specialty actors with specific tools and instructions
- **Teams** are collaborative bundles of agents (in *coordinate* or *collaborate* modes)
- **Router** decides which agent handles each message

---

### 🚀 Quick Start

The easiest way to get started is with the full Docker Compose stack:

```bash
git clone https://github.com/mindroom-ai/mindroom-stack
cd mindroom-stack
cp .env.example .env
# Add at least one AI provider key (e.g. OPENAI_API_KEY)
docker compose up -d
```

Then open:
- **MindRoom UI**: http://localhost:8765
- **Chat client**: http://localhost:8080
- **Matrix homeserver**: http://localhost:8008

---

### 📄 Reference

*Answer based on:* `page__index.md`
🔧 `get_skill_instructions` [1]

🔧 `get_skill_reference` [2]

🧠 Core Concept

Matrix-native Agents live in Matrix rooms and respond to messages
Persistent memory Agent & team-scoped memory across conversations
100+ tool integrations GitHub, Slack, Gmail, Calendar, and more
Router Built-in traffic director routes messages to the right agent
Skills OpenClaw-compatible skills system for extended capabilities
Knowledge Bases File-backed RAG indexing for document search
